response: A person can use personal finance management by tracking their income and expenses. They can create a budget that outlines their monthly expenses. They can save money regularly and invest in assets. They can use financial tools to monitor their spending. They can avoid debt and pay bills on time. They can educate themselves about personal finance. They can seek professional advice if needed. They can prioritize their needs over wants. They can plan for the future and set financial goals. They can manage their money wisely and make informed decisions.
